reasoning: The Lean signature captures each element of the informal claim exactly. `[Ring R] [Ring S]` with `φ : R →+* S` encodes "homomorphism of rings"; `Function.Surjective φ` encodes "surjective"; and `φ '' (center R) ⊆ center S` (with `center` from `Set` due to `open Set`) expresses "the image of the center of R is contained in the center of S". `Set.center` for a (non-unital, non-associative) ring is defined as `{z | IsMulCentral z}`, which coincides with the standard ring-theoretic center. No hypotheses are added or dropped, and the conclusion is neither weaker nor stronger than asked.
